project: This will delete your progress. Are you sure?

##1##

You may only perform one manual jump. To continue, you must bounce off the flies.

The objective is to smash all of them without falling to the floor or hitting the walls.
Spy flies are revealed by smashing the linked fly.
Congratulations! You have cleared the swamp of those pesky flies!
Made with love by the team at Viridino Studios.
